action.reasoning: Observation: Starting fresh. Need to build spatiotemporal traffic prediction model. Analysis: METR-LA dataset, classic benchmark. DCRNN/Graph WaveNet are SOTA but complex. Let me start with a simpler but effective model: a Graph WaveNet-style or simpler GRU+GCN baseline. Decision: Start with a simple but effective model — GRU encoder-decoder with graph convolution. First validate pipeline with few epochs.
